3020580.name: TouchNothing
3020580.description:
This is a simple and challenging indie level game that tests your patience.
The controls in this game are very simple and intuitive.
To keep you focused, the background music of this game is very simple.
By using the ticking of the clock to make your attention more focused, you can successfully complete the level in less time.
You can easily see the time spent in the game.
You can keep challenging yourself to get better results.
You can also compete with your friends to beat the level faster.

If you're bored and tired of playing some complex games, try this simple simple simple mini-game.
In a word It's fun, it's not complicated.

How to play:
Move metal ring from start to finish
Don‘t touch anything
Pay attention to the time it takes

About control commands：
There are instructions in the lower left corner of the game scene.
